message:
fix: call extractSimpleRole in BuildStartupCommandWithAgentOverride

Compound GT_ROLE values like gastown/refinery were not being simplified
to refinery before looking up RoleAgents keys. BuildStartupCommand
already did this correctly; this brings the override variant in line.

Fixes gt-lyx7f

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1433,7 +1433,7 @@ func BuildStartupCommandWithAgentOverride(envVars map[string]string, rigPath, pr
 	var townRoot string
 
 	// Extract role from envVars for role-based agent resolution (when no override)
-	role := envVars["GT_ROLE"]
+	role := extractSimpleRole(envVars["GT_ROLE"])
 
 	if rigPath != "" {
 		townRoot = filepath.Dir(rigPath)
